title: Composition comprising an elastomer and an ionic liquid
abstract: The invention relates to a composition comprising at least one fluoroelastomer and at least one ionic liquid [liquid (IL)], wherein said elastomer (E) comprises recurring units derived from vinylidene fluoride (VDF) and recurring units derived from at least one monomer different from VDF, and said liquid (IL) comprises an onium cation and an anion complying with the following structure (I) wherein R is selected from the group consisting of F and C 1 -C 5 perfluoroalkyl groups.
claims: Claims Claims Claim 1. A composition [composition (C)] comprising at least one fluoroelastomer [elastomer (E)] and at least one ionic liquid [liquid (IL)], wherein: - said at least one elastomer (E) has a heat of fusion of less than 10 J/g, preferably less than 5 J/g, more preferably less than 2.5 J/g, when determined according to ASTM D3418, and a glass transition temperature (Tg) below 10Â°C, preferably below 5Â°C, more preferably below 0Â°C, when determined according to ASTM D3418; - said at least one elastomer (E) comprises recurring units derived from vinylidene fluoride (VDF) and recurring units derived from at least one monomer different from VDF; - said at least one liquid (IL) comprises an onium cation and an anion complying with the following structure (I): wherein R is selected from the group consisting of F and C1-C5 perfluoroalkyl groups. Claim 2. The composition according to claim 1 , wherein said elastomer (E) comprises an amount of recurring units derived from VDF of at least 40%(mol), preferably of at least 60%(mol), more preferably of at least 70%(mol), and preferably of at most 85%(mol), more preferably of at most 80%(mol), with respect to the total moles of recurring units of elastomer (E). Claim 3. The composition according to claim 1 or 2, wherein said at least one monomer different from VDF is hexafluoropropylene (HFP). Claim 4. The composition according to claim 3, said elastomer (E) consisting of recurring units derived from VDF and recurring units derived from HFP, the molar ratio between recurring units derived from VDF and recurring units derived from FIFP preferably ranging from 70/30 to 80/20, and being more preferably 78/22. Claim 5. The composition according to any of the previous claims, wherein R is -CF 3 . Claim 6. The composition according to any of the previous claims, wherein said onium cation has at least one nitrogen as cationic atom. Claim 7. The composition according to claim 6, wherein said onium cation is cyclic, being preferably 5-membered or 6-membered. Claim 8. The composition according to claim 7, wherein said onium cation is aromatic. Claim 9. The composition according to claim 8, wherein said onium cation is an imidazolium cation of formula (ll-E): wherein Ri, R 2 , R3, R 4 , Rs are independently selected from hydrogen and hydrocarbon groups having 1 to 8 carbon atoms. Claim 10. The composition according to claim 9, wherein Ri is a methyl group, R3 is an ethyl group and R 2 , R 4 , Rs are hydrogen atoms. Claim 11. The composition according to claim 7, wherein said onium cation is saturated. Claim 12. The composition according to claim 11 , wherein said onium cation is a pyrrolidium cation of formula (lll-E): lll-E wherein Ri, RâI, R2, Râ2, R3, Râ3, R4, Râ4, Rs, Râs are independently selected from hydrogen and hydrocarbon groups having 1 to 8 carbon atoms. Claim 13. The composition according to claim 12, wherein Ri is a propyl group, RâI is a methyl group and R2, Râ2, R3, Râ3, R4, Râ4, Rs, Râs are hydrogen atoms. Claim 14. The composition according to any one of the previous claims, comprising said at least one elastomer (E) in an amount of at least 30%(wt), preferably of at least 40%(wt), and preferably of at most 90%(wt), more preferably of at most 70%(wt), with respect to the total weight of the composition (C). Claim 15. The composition according to any one of the previous claims, comprising said at least one liquid (IL) in an amount of at least 10%(wt), preferably of at least 30%(wt), and preferably of at most 70%(wt), more preferably of at most 60%(wt), with respect to the total weight of the composition (C). Claim 16. Actuators, sensors, electrodes, supercapacitors, transistors comprising a composition according to any of the previous claims.
